item.title: Integration management — clawhq integrate add/remove/swap/list
steps: Create src/cli/integrate.ts with integrate subcommand group
Implement `clawhq integrate add <type>`: walk through provider selection (e.g., Google Calendar vs. iCloud vs. CalDAV), credential setup with live validation, config generation
On add: write credential to .env, install integration tool, update TOOLS.md, check cron dependencies, update egress firewall allowlist for provider's API domains, run targeted doctor health check

Implement `clawhq integrate remove <name>`: clean credential from .env, uninstall tool, update TOOLS.md, update identity files to remove references, flag orphaned cron dependencies, tighten firewall allowlist
Implement `clawhq integrate swap <category> <new-provider>`: change backend provider (e.g., `integrate swap calendar icloud`) while preserving agent behavior — same category interface, new backend
Implement `clawhq integrate list`: show all integrations with provider, status, credential health, last-used
Write unit tests for integration lifecycle and firewall allowlist management
acceptanceCriteria: `clawhq integrate add` validates credentials live before completing setup
Adding an integration atomically updates egress firewall allowlist for that provider's domains
`clawhq integrate swap` changes provider without changing agent's task behavior (same category interface)
`clawhq integrate remove` tightens firewall allowlist and cleans all config references
`clawhq integrate list` shows credential health status per integration
